title: BUG: DID document missing authentication field
description: The DID document built by `did_web_document()` in src/did.rs (line 84-117) has no `authentication` field. Per the W3C DID Core spec, the `authentication` property lists verification methods authorized for authentication. Without it, DID resolvers cannot determine which keys can be used to authenticate as the DID subject. Should be: `"authentication": ["{did}#main-key", "{did}#recovery-key"]` (or at minimum the main-key). This also means assertionMethod is missing, though that is less critical.
